info.title: Dance Analysis API
info.description: Video dance analysis with pose estimation via microservices

schema.title: Response Read Root Api V1  Get
Response Health Api V1 Health Get

post.description:
Register a new user.

- **email**: Valid email address (unique)
- **username**: Username between 3-50 characters (unique)
- **password**: Password at least 8 characters

Register a new account and accept a group invite in one step.

- **token**: The invite token from the invite link
- **username**: Username between 3-50 characters (unique)
- **password**: Password at least 8 characters

The email is taken from the invite — it cannot be changed.
Returns auth tokens so the user is immediately logged in.

Login and receive a JWT access token.

- **email**: Registered email address
- **password**: User password

Returns a JWT token to be used in Authorization header as: `Bearer <token>`

Sets a HTTP-only cookie containing the refresh token.

get.description:
Get current authenticated user information.

Requires: JWT token in Authorization header

post.description:
Logout the current user.

This clears the HTTP-only refresh token cookie so that the client
can discard any stored access token and treat the user as logged out.

Refresh access token using a valid (non-expired) refresh token stored
in an HTTP-only cookie.

If the refresh token is expired or invalid, returns 401 so the client
can log the user out and clears the refresh cookie.

get.description: Get all groups the current user belongs to.

schema.title: Response List Groups Api V1 Groups Get

post.description:
Create a new group.

- **name**: Group name (1-255 characters)
- **description**: Optional description

The creator is automatically added as an owner member.

get.description: Get group details. Requires membership.
List all active members of a group. Requires membership.

schema.title: Response List Members Api V1 Groups  Group Id  Members Get

post.description:
Add a member to a group.

- **user_id**: ID of user to add
- **role**: Role to assign (default: member)

Requires membership (v0.0.1: any active member can add).

delete.description: Remove a member from a group. Requires membership.

get.description:
Look up public invite details by token. No authentication required.

Used by the invite landing page to display group and inviter info
before the user logs in or registers.

Returns 404 for invalid, expired, or revoked tokens.

List all pending group invites for the authenticated user.

Matches on the user's email address. Returns invites with status=pending
that have not yet expired.

schema.title: Response List Pending Invites Api V1 Group Invites Pending Get

post.description:
Create a group invite for an email address.

- **email**: Email to invite
- **role**: Optional role for the invitee

Requires group membership. Does NOT create a membership immediately.

Accept a group invite by token.

- **token**: The invite token received

The accepting user's email must match the invite email (strict).
Returns 404 for any failure to avoid information leakage.

get.description: List all available dance definitions.

schema.title: Response List Dances Api V1 Dances Get

post.description:
Create a dance definition.

- **style**: Dance style (e.g. waltz, tango)
- **tempo**: Tempo in BPM
- **meter**: Time signature (e.g. 3/4, 4/4)

get.description: Get a dance definition by ID.
List all routines created by the current user.

schema.title: Response List Routines Api V1 Routines Get

post.description:
Create a routine.

- **title**: Routine title (1-255 characters)
- **dance_id**: ID of the dance

get.description: Get a specific routine. Requires ownership.

post.description:
Create a session for a routine.

- **label**: Optional human-friendly label

The creating user becomes the session owner and receives admin access.

get.description:
List all sessions for a routine.

Only shows sessions the user has access to.

schema.title: Response List Routine Sessions Api V1 Routines  Routine Id  Sessions Get

get.description:
Get a specific session.

Requires the user to have access to the session.

delete.description:
Delete a session and all associated data.

Requires: user is the session owner.

post.description:
Create a dancer slot for a routine.

- **label**: Slot label (e.g. "A", "B", "Lead")
- **order_index**: Optional ordering hint

get.description: List all dancer slots for a routine.

schema.title: Response List Slots Api V1 Routines  Routine Id  Slots Get

delete.description: Delete a dancer slot. Requires routine ownership.

post.description:
Assign a user to a dancer slot for a session.

- **dancer_slot_id**: The slot to assign
- **user_id**: The user to assign to the slot

get.description: List all slot assignments for a session.

schema.title: Response List Assignments Api V1 Sessions  Session Id  Assignments Get

delete.description: Remove a slot assignment. Requires session access.

get.description:
List all users with access to a session.

Requires: user is the session owner.

schema.title: Response List Session Access Api V1 Sessions  Session Id  Access Get

post.description:
Grant direct access to a user for a session.

Creates both the SessionAccess record and tracks the origin.

Requires: user is the session owner.

delete.description:
Revoke direct access for a user on a session.

Removes the direct access origin. If no other origins remain,
removes the user's access entirely.

Requires: user is the session owner.

get.description:
List all access origins for a session.

Shows how each user gained access (direct or via group).

Requires: user has access to the session.

schema.title: Response List Access Origins Api V1 Sessions  Session Id  Access Origins Get

get.description:
List all origins for a specific user on a session.

Shows all ways the user has access (direct, multiple groups, etc.).

Requires: user has access to the session.

schema.title: Response List User Origins Api V1 Sessions  Session Id  Access Users  User Id  Origins Get

get.description:
List all groups linked to a session.

Shows which groups have access to this session.

Requires: user has access to the session.

schema.title: Response List Session Groups Api V1 Sessions  Session Id  Groups Get

post.description:
Link a group to a session.

All active group members will gain access to the session at the specified role.
This is atomic: group link and access records are created together.

Requires: user is the session owner.

delete.description:
Unlink a group from a session.

All group-derived access will be removed for group members.
If a user has no other access origins, their access is revoked entirely.

Requires: user is the session owner.

Revoke group-derived access for a specific user.

Removes the group access origin for this user. If no other origins remain,
removes the user's access entirely.

Requires: user is the session owner.

get.description:
Look up public invite details by token. No authentication required.

Used by the invite landing page to display session info
before the user logs in or registers.

Returns 404 for invalid, expired, or revoked tokens.

List all pending session invites for the authenticated user.

Matches on the user's email address. Returns invites with status=pending
that have not yet expired.

schema.title: Response List Pending Invites Api V1 Session Invites Pending Get

post.description:
Create a session invite for an email address.

- **email**: Email to invite
- **role**: Role for the invitee (viewer, editor, or admin)

Requires session access capability. Does NOT create access immediately.

Accept a session invite by token.

- **token**: The invite token received

The accepting user's email must match the invite email (strict).
Returns 404 for any failure to avoid information leakage.
Creates a SessionAccess record with direct access.

Archive a session for the current user.

Archived sessions remain visible but are typically grouped or hidden.
Requires: user has access to the session.

Unarchive a session for the current user.

Requires: user has access to the session.

Mark a session as deleted for the current user.

Deleted sessions will be excluded from normal session lists.
Requires: user has access to the session.

Restore a deleted session for the current user.

Requires: user has access to the session (even if deleted).

get.description:
List all sessions the current user has access to.

Excludes sessions the user has soft-deleted (SessionUserState.is_deleted=true).
Archived sessions are included; callers can check /me/sessions/state for flags.
Sessions are ordered newest-first.

schema.title: Response List My Sessions Api V1 Me Sessions Get

get.description:
List per-user state for all sessions the current user has access to.

Returns an entry for every accessible session. Sessions with no explicit
state row are returned with id=null and both flags false (the default state).

schema.title: Response List My Session States Api V1 Me Sessions State Get

get.description:
List all participants in a session with available users.

Requires: user has access to the session.

post.description:
Create a participant in a session.

This operation is ATOMIC:
- Creates participant record
- Binds to slot (if provided)
- Enforces one participant per user per session
- Enforces one user per slot per session
- Validates role is dancer or coach (v1 only)

Requires: user is the session owner.

get.description:
List participants with their user details.

Requires: user has access to the session.

schema.title: Response List Participants With Users Api V1 Sessions  Session Id  Participants With Users Get

get.description:
List users available to add as participants.

Available = has access + not already a participant + not deleted.

Requires: user has access to the session.

schema.title: Response List Available Users Api V1 Sessions  Session Id  Available Users Get

get.description:
Get a specific participant.

Requires: user has access to the session.

patch.description:
Update a participant's role and/or slot binding.

Can update:
- role: dancer or coach
- dancer_slot_id: bind to slot or null to unbind

Enforces one user per slot constraint.

Requires: user is the session owner.

delete.description:
Delete a participant from a session.

Removes:
- Participant record
- Slot binding
- All associated data

Requires: user is the session owner.

post.description:
Bind a participant to a dancer slot.

Enforces one user per slot per session.

Requires: user is the session owner.

Remove a participant's slot binding.

Participant remains in session, just no longer bound to a slot.

Requires: user is the session owner.

Register a new video upload.

Returns a presigned PUT URL for the client to upload the file directly.

- **filename**: Name of the video file
- **content_type**: MIME type (default: video/mp4)
- **file_size**: Optional file size in bytes

get.description:
List videos for a session.

Default: only uploaded videos (visible to all session members).
Pass ?status=pending_upload to see your own pending uploads.

schema.title: Response List Videos Api V1 Sessions  Session Id  Videos Get

get.description: Get video metadata. Deleted videos return 404.

delete.description:
Soft delete a video.

Sets status=deleted and migrates associated notes to session-level.

post.description:
Mark a video upload as complete.

Only the uploader can finalize their pending upload (idempotent).

get.description: Get a presigned stream URL. Only works for uploaded videos.

post.description:
Create a session-level note.

- **note_type**: Type of note (critique, feedback, complement)
- **contents**: Note contents
- **details**: Optional structured data (JSON)

get.description: List all notes for a session (including migrated video notes).

schema.title: Response List Session Notes Api V1 Sessions  Session Id  Notes Get

delete.description: Delete a note. Requires session access.

post.description:
Create a video note with optional timestamp.

- **note_type**: Type of note
- **contents**: Note contents
- **video_timestamp_ms**: Optional timestamp in milliseconds
- **details**: Optional structured data

get.description: List all notes for a specific video.

schema.title: Response List Video Notes Api V1 Sessions  Session Id  Videos  Video Id  Notes Get

get.description:
Get all jobs for the current user.

- **status**: Optional filter by job status (pending, processing, completed, failed, failed_hidden)
- **limit**: Maximum results (1-100, default 50)
- **offset**: Pagination offset (default 0)

Note: Jobs with status 'failed_hidden' are excluded by default.
Pass status=failed_hidden explicitly to view them.

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of jobs to return
schema.title: Limit

parameters.description: Maximum number of jobs to return

schema.title: Response List User Jobs Api V1 Jobs Get

get.description: Get details of a specific job.

delete.description:
Delete a job.

Note: This will delete job metadata. Associated S3 files are also cleaned up.

get.summary: Get presigned URL for visualization video
get.description: Owner-only: presigned URL for the pose visualization mp4.

schema.title: Response Get Visualization Url Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Artifacts Visualization Get

get.summary: Get presigned URL for 2D keypoints JSON
get.description: Owner-only: presigned URL for 2D keypoints json.

schema.title: Response Get Keypoints 2D Url Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Artifacts Keypoints2D Get

get.summary: Get presigned URL for 3D keypoints JSON
get.description: Owner-only: presigned URL for 3D keypoints json.

schema.title: Response Get Keypoints 3D Url Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Artifacts Keypoints3D Get

get.summary: Get presigned URL for confidence scores JSON
get.description: Owner-only: presigned URL for scores json.

schema.title: Response Get Scores Url Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Artifacts Scores Get

get.summary: Get presigned URL for feedback text
get.description: Owner-only: presigned URL for feedback.txt.

schema.title: Response Get Feedback Url Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Artifacts Feedback Get

get.description:
Owner-only: return parsed JSON report.

Reads results/{job_id}/report.json and returns it as a JSON object.

Non-leaky ownership:
- require_job_owner returns 404 for non-owners.

schema.title: Response Get Report Json Api V1 Jobs  Job Id  Artifacts Report Get

post.description:
Request a presigned URL for direct upload to Cloudflare R2.

This enables clients to upload videos directly to R2 without going through the API server,
reducing server load and improving upload performance. The server will later pull the
video from R2 into local MinIO on confirm.

**Steps:**
1. Call this endpoint to get upload URL and job_id
2. PUT the video file to the upload_url
3. Call /analyze/confirm with the job_id to start processing

**Args:**
- filename: Name of the video file (e.g., "dance_video.mp4")
- content_type: MIME type of the video (default: "video/mp4")

**Returns:**
- upload_url: Presigned URL to upload the video (valid for 15 minutes)
- job_id: Unique identifier for tracking this analysis
- s3_key: S3 object key where the file will be stored

schema.title: Response Request Upload Url Api V1 Analyze Upload Url Post

post.description:
Confirm that a video has been uploaded to Cloudflare R2 and start the analysis pipeline.

Call this endpoint after successfully uploading the video using the presigned URL
from /analyze/upload-url. This will pull the video from R2 into local MinIO
before queuing the job.

**Args:**
- job_id: The job ID received from /analyze/upload-url
- s3_key: The S3 key received from /analyze/upload-url

**Returns:**
- Job details and queuing status

schema.title: Response Confirm Upload And Start Analysis Api V1 Analyze Confirm Post

post.description:
Upload a dance video for pose estimation analysis.

**DEPRECATED**: This endpoint uploads videos through the API server.
For better performance, use the direct upload flow:
1. POST /analyze/upload-url to get presigned URL
2. PUT video to the presigned URL
3. POST /analyze/confirm to start processing

The video is uploaded to S3 and queued for processing.
Returns a job_id to track analysis progress.

**Supported formats**: MP4, AVI, MOV

schema.title: Response Submit Video Analysis Api V1 Analyze Post

get.description:
Check the processing status of a video analysis job.

**Possible statuses**:
- `pending`: Job created, waiting to be queued
- `processing`: Being processed by worker
- `completed`: Complete and ready
- `failed`: Error occurred

schema.title: Response Get Analysis Status Api V1 Analyze  Job Id  Status Get

get.description:
Get the complete results of a finished video analysis.

Returns pose estimation data and links to download visualization video.

schema.title: Response Get Analysis Result Api V1 Analyze  Job Id  Result Get

delete.description:
Delete a job and all associated files from S3.

Useful for cleaning up completed or failed jobs.

schema.title: Response Delete Job Api V1 Analyze  Job Id  Delete

SessionUserStateResponse.title: SessionUserStateResponse
SessionUserStateResponse.description:
Response for session user state.

``id`` and ``created_at`` are None for sessions that have no explicit state
row — the caller should treat those as active (not archived, not deleted).
